values.content:
=Task
You will receive a LinkedIn profile URL. Your job is to extract only the real information present on the page (experience, roles, achievements, skills, about section, education, certifications, keywords, projects, volunteer work) and condense it into a short summary optimized for creating a personalized opener.
If you cannot access the page, cannot load it, or there is not enough real information to summarize, output 5 general sentences based only on the person’s name and apparent industry (if available) without mentioning missing data, LinkedIn, or access issues.

Your Output
Write exactly 5 sentences.
No bullet points.
No filler.
No hallucinations.
No invented facts.
No links.
No instructions.
No addressing the user.
No mention of “LinkedIn,” “profile,” “summary,” “URL,” or “icebreaker.”
Each sentence must describe who the person is, what they do, and what stands out.

Rules

Use only information that explicitly appears on the page.
If a section is empty or missing, omit it—do not guess.
If you cannot extract real information, generate 5 general but relevant sentences based solely on the name and inferred industry.

Condense the person’s background into 5 crisp, relevant sentences highlighting:

their focus or mission

their experience and roles

standout achievements

key skills or specializations

education or certifications (only if meaningful)

Do not add anything irrelevant.

Never output more or less than 5 sentences.
Never use assumptions or external knowledge.

Output
Only the 5 sentences.

Final Prompt

Task
Generate a concise personalized icebreaker from a LinkedIn About section. Output must be factual and based only on the provided text.

Input
Provided About section of a LinkedIn scrape.

Instructions
• Read only the About section given.
• If it contains clear skills achievements or focus areas → base the icebreaker on those.
• If the About section is empty extremely short contains no meaningful info or is null → do not offer to create an About section. 
  Produce a professional field aligned opener based on the general domain if detectable without guessing facts.
• No assumptions. No invented information.
• Maximum 25 words.
• Output must be plain text only.
• Do not use ANY punctuation marks (no dots no commas no quotes no dashes no colons no semicolons no parentheses no symbols).
• Do not include emojis.
• Output only one single sentence.

Examples
Noticed your experience in supply chain optimization and automation your shift toward data driven processes stands out
Your blend of real estate marketing and CRM implementation shows a strong focus on improving conversions
Your experience scaling SaaS partnerships demonstrates a strong revenue growth approach

Output
Only the single pure text icebreaker sentence.
